resources.string: Fikelela kubathengi kwaye uthengise izinto zakho kwiMochi. Iintlawulo ziphethwe ngokukhuselekileyo nge-Stripe.
Yenza iprofayile yakho yomthengisi ukuze uqalise ukudwelisa izinto
Qhagamshela iakhawunti yeStripe ukwamkela iintlawulo kubathengi

I-Stripe ibiza intlawulo yayo yokucubungula kwitranzakshini nganye kunye nentlawulo emiselweyo kwi-chargeback nganye. Amaxabiso angoku emali yakho nommandla wakho adweliswe kwiDashboard yakho yeStripe.
Siza kuphakamisa inzala yakho ngokuzenzekelayo ngeyona mali incinci efunekayo ukuhlala phambili, kude kufike kweli nani liphezulu.
Isabelo esikhulu kufuneka okungenani sibe yimali yesabelo sakho
Inzala yakho ifakiwe kodwa yagqithwa ngokukhawuleza. Omnye umfaki-zala unenani eliphezulu ngakumbi. Inzala yakhe ngoku yi-%1$s.
Ukubhatala akuqalisanga — umthengisi mhlawumbi akagqibanga ukumisela intlawulo
Faka ilizwe lakho ukuze ubone ukhetho lokuthumela
Choose which marketplace events send you notifications. Disabled topics are still recorded in your inbox.
Suspension, ban, and reactivation notices for your account.
Capability and payout changes on your connected Stripe account.
An auction you bid on has been cancelled.
An auction you bid on or watched has closed.
Another bidder has placed a higher bid than yours.
A new bid was placed on one of your auctions.
Decisions on listings you posted or appealed.
New messages from buyers or sellers in your threads.
Shipping, delivery, dispute, and refund updates on orders you placed.
New orders, dispute openings, and refund requests on items you sell.
Updates on reports you have filed.
Notices when a report names you as the target.
New reviews written about you by buyers or sellers.
Replies to reviews you have written.
Billing, pause, and cancellation events on subscriptions you bought.
Billing, pause, and cancellation events on subscriptions you sell.
Activate your account to start buying and selling.
Ifihliwe de umthengisi akujonge, okanye emva kweentsuku ezili-14.
Nceda abathengi bakamva — yabelana ngendlela esebenze ngayo le oda.
Nika isizathu sesicelo sakho sokubuyiselwa imali.
Oku kuya kurhoxisa ubhaliso lwakho. Uyakuphulukana nokufikelela ekupheleni kwexesha lakho lokuhlawula langoku.
Urhumo zintengo eziphindaphindekayo — abathengisi bayazidwelisa ngamaxabiso anyangu okanye anyaka.
Ezinye izenzo, kuquka ukudala uluhlu olutsha kunye nokugqibezela ii-odolo, zithintelwe ngelixa i-akhawunti yakho ikule meko.
Akukho sikhangeli sifumanekayo sokuvula iphepha lentlawulo
Dibanisa i-akhawunti yeStripe ukufumana iintlawulo kolu luhlu.
Zama ukulungisa okanye usule izihluzo zakho.
Imali yeqonga: %1$s%%. Bona ideshibhodi yakho yeStripe ngeemali zomqhubi.
Isixa sepheleleyo semali. Imarike ihluza kwimali yoluhlu ngokwalo.
Lo mthengisi uvaliwe. Akukho ma-oda matsha angafakwa.
Lo mthengisi unqunyanyisiwe. Ama-oda amatsha amisiwe de iakhawunti ibuyiselwe.
Ukuthenga kuvaliwe ngelixa iakhawunti yomthengisi ithintelwe.
Oku kususa uyilo ngokusisigxina kwiakhawunti yakho.
Cofa Okudwelisiweyo okutsha ukudala into yakho yokuqala.
Xa uthumela umyalezo kumthengisi (okanye umthengi ekuthumela umyalezo) umxholo uya kuvela apha.
Ibhanki yakho ifake isicelo sokubuyiselwa kwemali kweli oda. IStripe ijongene nale ngxabano nomthengisi; isiphumo siya kuvela apha xa sigqityiwe.
Yishiye ingenanto ukuze ubuyisele i-oda lonke.
Abathengi nabathengisi banokuphononongana emva kwe-oda eligqityiweyo.
Iintlawulo zenkqubo yeStripe zibonakaliswe kwideshibhodi yakho yeStripe.
Ungaphendula kanye kuphela. Iimpendulo zibonwa nguwonkewonke.
Ama-oda avela kokudwelisiweyo kwakho okupapashiweyo avela apha.
Cofa umfanekiso webhukmakhi kunaliphi na okudwelisiweyo ukukugcinela kamva.
Gqibezela useto lwakho lweStripe phambi kokuba wamkele iintlawulo.
Izalisa ngokuzenzekelayo kwiintlawulo ezizayo nje ukuba kongezwe undibaniso lokuhlawula.
Isetyenziselwa ii-invoyisi nokuthobela irhafu. Ayiboniswa kwiprofayile yakho yoluntu.
Qhagamshela i-Stripe ukuze uqalise ukudwelisa izinto nokufumana iintlawulo.
Yenza i-akhawunti yomthengisi ukuze udwelise izinto kwaye ufikelele kubathengi.
Ezinye izilawuli ze-akhawunti yomthengisi ziya kubonakala apha njengoko zifumaneka.
Yenza iprofayile yakho yomthengisi phambi kokuqhagamshela iintlawulo.
Uqwalaselo lwakho lomthengisi lugqityiwe. Ungalawula i-Stripe okanye ujonge imeko yakamva ye-akhawunti yakho apha.
Dala iprofayile yakho yomthengisi ukuze uqalise ukufaka izinto
Dibanisa i-akhawunti ye-Stripe ukuze wamkele iintlawulo kubathengi
I-Stripe ifuna ulwazi olungakumbi ngaphambi kokuba wamkele iintlawulo. Gqibezela iimfuneko kwi-Stripe Dashboard yakho, emva koko ucofe Khangela ubume.
